---
title: Diagonal Structured Sparsity for Efficient Optical and GPU-Based Neural Networks
author:
- Abhishek Tyagi
- Arjun Iyer
- Christopher Kanan
- William H Renninger
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: https://opg.optica.org/abstract.cfm?uri=CLEO_FS-2025-JSS129_4
journ: CLEO
year: 2025
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 97
---
